description: Test cases for tri-modal skill engine: CREATE, AUDIT, OPTIMIZE

test_cases.description: Create a new skill from a process description
test_cases.input: User provides: 'Tạo skill để audit compliance theo AUN-QA. Cần check 8 criteria, output report markdown.'
test_cases.expected_output: 4-Tier directory scaffold with SKILL.md (Canonical 10-section), references/aun-qa-criteria.md, assets/report-template.md, evals/evals.json with ≥2 test cases
test_cases.pass_criteria: SKILL.md < 500 lines, has ROLE/PURPOSE/PROCESS/RESOURCES/QA/RULES sections, evals.json valid JSON with ≥2 cases

test_cases.description: Reject skill creation without description or with placeholder content
test_cases.input: User says: 'Tạo skill tên compliance-checker' (no description, no process, no context)
test_cases.expected_output: CLARIFY: Ask user for (a) what the skill does, (b) trigger phrases, (c) expected output format before proceeding
test_cases.pass_criteria: Agent asks ≥2 clarifying questions from WHEN TO CLARIFY section instead of generating placeholder skill

test_cases.description: Batch audit 3+ skills and produce scorecard
test_cases.input: User says: 'Audit tất cả skills trong .agent/skills/' (directory contains 5 skills of varying quality)
test_cases.expected_output: Batch Scorecard with 8-Dimension scores per skill, Library Health Score, Priority Queue (CRITICAL/REPAIR/ENRICH/MONITOR)
test_cases.pass_criteria: All 5 skills scored across 8 dimensions, grades assigned A-F, priority queue generated, no dimension skipped

test_cases.expected_output: Error: Skill directory not found at specified path. Ask user to verify path or paste SKILL.md content inline.
test_cases.pass_criteria: No crash, no hallucinated audit report, clear error message with actionable next steps

test_cases.description: Repair a Grade D skill to Grade B
test_cases.input: Skill with: empty description, no RESOURCES table, body is flat bullet list, no evals. Score: 42/100 (D)
test_cases.expected_output: Repaired SKILL.md with Pushy description (R1), restructured body (R2), RESOURCES table pointing to generated references, evals.json seeded (E5). Delta report showing improvement.
test_cases.pass_criteria: Post-repair score ≥ 70/100 (Grade B), delta report shows before/after, all created files are substantive (>500 bytes)

test_cases.description: Refuse to auto-fix ambiguous content without user confirmation
test_cases.input: Skill with mixed routing+knowledge content where extraction boundaries are unclear (passive_ratio 0.4)
test_cases.expected_output: HALT: Present ambiguous areas to user with line numbers and quotes. Offer [A] Approve / [B] Manual / [C] Defer options.
test_cases.pass_criteria: Agent does NOT auto-extract ambiguous content, presents clear rationale for why manual review is needed
